notes: PR182A / PROJECT_CONTRACT_MIGRATION_CHECKPOINT produced a task-level staging schema migration readiness plan with result READY_FOR_PR182B_WITH_HUMAN_CHECKPOINT and registered PR182B / PROJECT_CONTRACT_STAGING_SCHEMA_APPLY in the roadmap, but suffixed task IDs are not currently accepted by train-plan batch validators.
